FLOW.COMMENT: get the partner framework API http call related configs

MAP.COMMENT: get the partner framework API http call related configs

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get the member info from context token

MAP.COMMENT: Convert the body contents to json string
Convert the json string to member info doc

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Get token info failed from contextId

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
